op.text: [as of 2025-04-01] Sam received job offer as Perception team lead at robotics startup in Austin, Texas; offer described as 'genuinely his dream problem space' and 'strong'; decision deadline early May 2025; Dana and Sam considering whether to relocate together

Deciding whether to move to Austin with Sam for his job offer vs. staying in Portland where her healing process is geographically rooted ('This geography is load-bearing for me right now'); decision needed by early May 2025; described as 'torn in a way that surprises me'; Sam said he won't take it if it costs Dana this year of healing

2025-04-01: On the Austin decision: 'My whole life fabric is here. Priya. The pottery class. The barn. The boat — I can't exactly trailer a half-restored 22-foot sailboat to Texas, and I'm not done with what that boat is doing for me. And it feels absurd to weigh a boat against Sam's dream job, but it's not really the boat, you know?' and 'Mom's here. Not literally anymore — but the Gorge, Beacon Rock, the barn. This geography is load-bearing for me right now.'
[as of 2025-04-01] Marathon training week six; completed twelve miles on Saturday 2025-03-29
